name: SpaceandPeople plc
summary: SpaceandPeople PLC markets and sells promotional and retail licensing space on behalf of shopping centers, retail parks, railway stations, and other venues in the United Kingdom, Germany, and India. The company operates in two segments, Promotional Sales and Retail. The company markets, sells, and administers space in footfall venues, including shopping centers, garden centers, city centers, retail parks, and travel hubs. It also offers the customer connect kiosk, a digital experiential platform for promotional activities of companies; and media services, as well as leases retail merchandising units. In addition, the company provides consumer brands the opportunity to promote their products through direct consumer engagement with experiential marketing events; and designs, builds, and installs kiosks, pop-up shops, and mobile kiosks to suit business needs and requirements. SpaceandPeople PLC was incorporated in 2000 and is headquartered in Glasgow, the United Kingdom.
